PurchaseOrderReceipt.Subject: Your receipt for {listingTitle}
PurchaseOrderReceipt.Title: Your receipt for {listingTitle}
PurchaseOrderReceipt.SubTitle: Thank you for purchasing {listingTitle} from {providerName}!
PurchaseOrderReceipt.Content1Body: The seller has 7 days to ship the item to our Quality Control HQ. Once we have received it, we will begin our expert authentication process. In most cases, authentication takes 24 hours but can take up to 72 hours depending on the item.
PurchaseOrderReceipt.Content2Title: ❤️ What is Quality Control and why is it important?
PurchaseOrderReceipt.Content2Body: The role of our Quality Control step is to ensure each item sold on ReGEM matches the description made by the seller. We will then inform you of the results of the Quality Control check and let you know when your item is on its way to you. Should your item not pass Quality Control we will be in touch with your next steps.
PurchaseOrderReceipt.Content2Link: Learn more about our authentication process here.
PendingOffer.Subject: {customerName} has a new offer for {listingTitle}
PendingOffer.Title: New offer for {listingTitle}!
PendingOffer.SubTitle: Good news! {customerName} made you an offer for {listingTitle}.

PendingOfferFromProvider.Title: New offer for {listingTitle}!
PendingOfferFromProvider.SubTitle: Good news! {providerName} sent you an offer for {listingTitle}.

AcceptedOffer.SubTitle: Good news! Your offer for {listingTitle} has been accepted.
ExpiredOffer.Subject: The offer for {listingTitle} has expired
ExpiredOffer.Title: The offer for {listingTitle} has expired!
ShippingAuthentication.Subject: {listingTitle} is on its way to Authentication 🚀
ShippingAuthentication.Title: {listingTitle} has shipped to ReGEM
ShippingAuthentication.SubTitle: {providerName} has marked {listingTitle} as shipped, and it’s en route to ReGEM Quality Control HQ for physical authentication by our jewelry experts 💎
ShippingAuthentication.Content1Body: Once we receive the item, we will begin our expert authentication process. In most cases, authentication takes 24 hours but can take up to 72 hours depending on the item. We will ship your order once it passes authentication, and you will receive your UPS tracking details!
ShippingAuthentication.Content2Title: ❤️ What is Quality Control and why is it important?
ShippingAuthentication.Content2Body: The role of our Quality Control step is to ensure each item sold on ReGEM matches the description made by the seller. Should your item not pass Quality Control we will be in touch with your next steps.
ShippingAuthentication.Content2Link: Learn more about our authentication process here.
ShippingVerified.Subject: Your order for {listingTitle} is on its way to you 🎉
ShippingVerified.Title: Good News 🎉 {listingTitle} has been verified and authenticated by our jewelry experts!
ShippingVerified.SubTitle: {listingTitle} has passed our Quality Control check, please find your Authentication Certificate and UPS Link in the your order details.
ShippingVerified.Content1Body: Once we receive the item, we will begin our expert authentication process. In most cases, authentication takes 24 hours but can take up to 72 hours depending on the item. We will ship your order once it passes authentication, and you will receive your UPS tracking details!
ShippingVerified.Content2Title: ❤️ What is Quality Control and why is it important?

CustomerAutoCancel.SubTitle: Unfortunately, your order for  {listingTitle} was automatically canceled as {providerName} did not ship the item to our Quality Control HQ on time. You will be refunded fully.
CustomerAutoCancel.Content1Body: Please feel free to drop us a line if you have any questions - we’re here for you!

CustomerOrderExpired.SubTitle: Unfortunately, your order for {listingTitle} from {providerName} was not “marked as shipped” to our Quality Control HQ within 7 days from the order, and was therefore automatically canceled. Please note, your payment was not charged.
CustomerOrderExpired.Content1Body: Please feel free to drop us a line if you have any questions - we’re here for you!

PurchaseMarkOrderReceivedReminder.Conten: You recently purchased {listingTitle} from {providerDisplayName}. If you received it already, please mark it as received from <orderlink>order details</orderlink>. Doing so allows us to release your payment to {providerDisplayName}.
If you don't react to this email, we will consider the order completed and release the payment on {date,date,::YYYYMMMd}.
If you did not receive what you ordered, please either contact {providerDisplayName} on the order details page or reach out to {marketplaceName} support.
PurchaseMarkOrderReceivedReminder.Subjec: Did you receive {listingTitle}? Let us know.
PurchaseMarkOrderReceivedReminder.Title: Let us know if you received {listingTitle}
PurchaseNewOrder.BreakdownLabel: {customerDisplayName} just placed an order for {listingTitle}. Here's the breakdown.
PurchaseNewOrder.DeliveryDetails: Once {customerDisplayName} has picked up {listingTitle}, remember to mark it as delivered from <salelink>order details</salelink> to receive your payment.
PurchaseNewOrder.MarkAsDelivered: If the order has not been marked as delivered within two weeks, it will expire automatically and you won't get paid.
PurchaseNewOrder.MarkAsShipped: If the order has not been marked as shipped within two weeks, it will expire automatically and you won't get paid.
PurchaseNewOrder.ShippingDetails: You should now ship {listingTitle} to {customerDisplayName}. You can find the shipping address from order details. Once you've shipped it, remember to mark it as shipped from <salelink>order details</salelink> to receive your payment.
PurchaseNewOrder.Subject: You've made a sale! 🎉 ({listingTitle})
PurchaseNewOrder.Title: New order for {listingTitle}
PurchaseNewOrder.SubTitle: Good news! {customerName} has bought {listingTitle}. You have 7 days to ship!
PurchaseNewOrder.Content1Body: Once we have received the item at ReGEM Quality Control HQ, we will begin our expert authentication process. In most cases, authentication takes 24 hours but can take up to 72 hours depending on the item.
PurchaseNewOrder.Content1Body2: If no issues are reported within that time, you will receive your payment within the following 5 business days.💰
PurchaseNewOrder.Step1: Get your item ready to ship - it’s easy!
PurchaseNewOrder.Step1Link: Here are our pro tips on packaging your precious cargo.
PurchaseNewOrder.Step2: Attach the UPS shipping label to your package and ship it! 🚀
PurchaseNewOrder.Step2Tips: Pro Tip: you can drop off your package at any UPS location or hand it to any UPS driver 🙂
PurchaseNewOrder.Disclaimer: ❗Remember: if a sold item is not shipped within 7 days of the sale, the order will be automatically canceled.
